title: 2x3dentkind
description: Replaces the trident with the 2x3dent used by Feferi and Meenah in Homestuck!
body:
## 🔱 2x3dentkind Replaces the trident model with the 2x3dent, used by Feferi and Meenah in Homestuck. 38D

**_!! This pack requires EMF or Optifine to properly function !!_**

Planning to add more variations soon, such as the Condesce's trident, and tiaratop Jane's trident ~~even though it isn't technically a 2x3dent~~
